servers.name: Context7
servers.author: upstash
servers.description: Up-to-date code documentation for LLMs. Provides version-specific documentation and code examples straight from the source, eliminating outdated or hallucinated API references.

servers.name: Sequential Thinking
servers.author: modelcontextprotocol
servers.description: An MCP server that provides a tool for dynamic, reflective problem-solving through a structured thinking process with branching and revision capabilities.

servers.name: Brave Search
servers.author: modelcontextprotocol
servers.description: Web and local search using Brave's Search API. Provides both web search and local business/place search capabilities.

envVars.name: BRAVE_API_KEY
envVars.label: Brave API Key
envVars.description: Your Brave Search API key from https://brave.com/search/api/

servers.name: Firecrawl
servers.author: mendableai
servers.description: Advanced web scraping, crawling, and batch processing. Extract clean content from any website with automatic format conversion.

envVars.name: FIRECRAWL_API_KEY
envVars.label: Firecrawl API Key
envVars.description: Your Firecrawl API key from https://www.firecrawl.dev/app/api-keys
